conservative.name: Bar the Doors of Death
conservative.requirements: 8 favour. You must perform a brief ritual creating a holy focus (a shrine, an incense brazier, etc.) for the blessing

success.description: You invoke the blessing, and the effect extends out to close range from the focus

boon.description: Each ally within the area of effect recovers 1 stress or 1 fatigue (his choice)

chaosStar.description: There's a flaw in the blessing. A necromancer may ignore this blessing if he can beat you in a Discipline (WP) vs. Discipline (WP) check. If he fails this check, he cannot try again
